context: Experience Plane detail for the seven-plane operating system. Covers human-facing entry surfaces across web, desktop, mobile, and future voice clients.

sections.content: Experience Plane owns human-facing entry surfaces across web, desktop, mobile, and future voice. Experience Plane optimizes interaction UX; Experience Plane does not hold system-of-record state.
Must_not = platform truth, dispatch truth, or durable resource truth. Current posture = required-unassigned. openclaw is partial candidate for mobile or device interaction surfaces.

changelog.delta: Initial seven-plane pilot module for Experience Plane.
